title: Cost-related compensation events under the conditions of contracts of the Public Procurement (Amendment) Act, 2016 (Act 914) for construction works in Ghana
abstract: Purpose The study aimed to identify and assess cost-related compensation events from the perspective of consultants, clients, and contractors. It measured the views of the tripartite on cost compensation events encountered during construction works and its subsequent effect on their project delivery. Design/methodology/approach A quantitative research approach was utilised, employing purposive sampling to select respondents. Twenty-five compensation events were identified in the literature, enumerated, and rigorously tested. The events were prioritised based on their significance, using the relative importance index. Factor analysis was employed to identify the common underlying factors among the variables. Findings The identified compensation events include inexperience, insufficient communication, and clients lacking a technical background. These are considered the most significant. The key common factors of compensation events discovered in the reduction study were Cost-Benefit to Stakeholders, Additional Works, and Technical Errors. Originality/value This paper makes a unique contribution to construction management literature by presenting an empirical and context-specific analysis of the impact of cost compensation events on overall project delivery costs. The study also provides significant insights for project stakeholders by emphasising the importance of proactive cost event identification, prompt notification, and comprehensive documentation in alleviating cost shocks.
title_cn: 根据2016年公共采购（修订）法（法案914）合同条件下，关于加纳建筑工程的与成本相关的补偿事件
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究旨在从顾问、客户和承包商的角度识别和评估与成本相关的补偿事件。研究测量了三方在施工过程中遇到的成本补偿事件的看法及其对项目交付的后续影响。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究采用定量研究方法，使用目的性抽样选择受访者。文献中识别出25个补偿事件，并进行了详细列举和严格测试。这些事件根据其重要性进行了优先排序，使用相对重要性指数。采用因子分析法识别变量之间的共同潜在因素。 发现 识别出的补偿事件包括缺乏经验、沟通不足以及客户缺乏技术背景。这些被认为是最重要的。在减少研究中发现的补偿事件的关键共同因素包括利益相关者的成本效益、额外工作和技术错误。 原创性/价值 本文通过提供对成本补偿事件对整体项目交付成本影响的实证和特定背景分析，为建筑管理文献做出了独特贡献。该研究还通过强调主动识别成本事件、及时通知和全面文档的重要性，为项目利益相关者提供了重要见解，以缓解成本冲击。

title: Individual variability in lumbar muscle activation with passive back-support exoskeletons: an EMG study of experienced construction workers
abstract: Purpose While back-support exoskeletons (BSE) have shown promise in laboratory studies during repetitive tasks, their effectiveness during realistic construction tasks with experienced workers remains poorly understood. This study evaluates the effectiveness of two commercially available BSE designs in reducing lumbar muscle activation during actual simulated masonry work and examines individual response variability among construction workers. Design/methodology/approach Twenty-three experienced masons performed standardized masonry activities involving concrete masonry units under three conditions simulated in a laboratory environment: no exoskeleton (baseline), HAPO exoskeleton and BISKO exoskeleton. Surface electromyography (sEMG) measured bilateral lumbar erector spinae (LES) muscle activation. Statistical analysis compared muscle activation changes between conditions and characterized individual worker responses using within-subject comparisons and group-level testing. Findings HAPO demonstrated superior effectiveness, achieving mean reductions of 10.0% (right LES) and 11.5% (left LES) in muscle activation, compared to BISKO's 3.4% and 7.0% reductions, respectively. However, individual responses varied substantially, ranging from 50% reductions to increased activation in some workers. Both exoskeletons showed consistently better performance for left LES compared to right LES, indicating significant bilateral asymmetry. Statistical analysis revealed that individual worker characteristics and established movement patterns from years of experience significantly influenced exoskeleton effectiveness. Originality/value This study addresses critical gaps by evaluating exoskeletons with real construction workers performing realistic masonry tasks, rather than laboratory volunteers with simplified activities. The comprehensive analysis of individual response variability challenges universal effectiveness assumptions and demonstrates that experienced workers' established movement patterns critically influence intervention outcomes. Results provide evidence for individualized implementation strategies rather than universal deployment approaches in occupational settings.
title_cn: 被动背部支撑外骨骼下腰部肌肉激活的个体变异性：一项针对经验丰富的建筑工人的肌电图研究
abstract_cn: 目的 尽管背部支撑外骨骼（BSE）在实验室研究中对重复性任务显示出良好的前景，但其在真实建筑任务中对经验丰富工人的有效性仍然不甚了解。本研究评估了两种市售BSE设计在实际模拟砌砖工作中减少腰部肌肉激活的有效性，并考察了建筑工人之间的个体反应变异性。 设计/方法 二十三名经验丰富的砌砖工人在实验室环境下进行标准化的砌砖活动，涉及混凝土砌块，分为三种条件：无外骨骼（基线）、HAPO外骨骼和BISKO外骨骼。通过表面肌电图（sEMG）测量双侧腰部竖脊肌（LES）的肌肉激活。统计分析比较了不同条件下的肌肉激活变化，并通过组内比较和组级测试对个体工人的反应进行了特征描述。 结果 HAPO外骨骼表现出更优的有效性，右侧LES的肌肉激活平均减少10.0%，左侧LES减少11.5%，而BISKO外骨骼的减少幅度分别为3.4%和7.0%。然而，个体反应差异显著，从50%的减少到某些工人的激活增加不等。两种外骨骼在左侧LES的表现均优于右侧LES，表明存在显著的双侧不对称性。统计分析显示，个体工人的特征和多年经验所形成的运动模式显著影响外骨骼的有效性。 原创性/价值 本研究通过评估真实建筑工人在执行真实砌砖任务时的外骨骼，填补了关键空白，而非仅仅依赖于参与实验室简化活动的志愿者。对个体反应变异性的全面分析挑战了普遍有效性的假设，并表明经验丰富工人所建立的运动模式对干预结果有重要影响。研究结果为个性化实施策略提供了证据，而非在职业环境中采用普遍部署的方法。

title: Hierarchical clustering of factors causing site clearance bottlenecks in ODA-funded salinity intrusion mitigation infrastructure projects
abstract: Purpose Numerous infrastructure projects have been launched to address the challenges posed by climate change. In Vietnam, these projects are primarily financed through Official Development Assistance (ODA) funding. However, during implementation, site clearance bottlenecks (SCBs) arise as major obstacles, undermining project efficiency and eroding national credibility. Design/methodology/approach This study identified 22 potential SCB factors through literature review and expert consultation, and surveyed 140 stakeholders using a structured questionnaire. The principal analysis tools were Cronbach's alpha, the Kruskal-Wallis test, hierarchical clustering, and mean-based assessment modeling. Findings Analysis results revealed financial issues, compensation prices, support policies, and document approvals as the most critical factors. There was strong consensus across many SCB factors, with both “financial constraints” and “unstable market conditions” consistently ranked by all stakeholder groups. Hierarchical clustering classified the 22 factors into four reliable groups, descendingly ranked in importance as: “financial and resettlement pressures”, “compensation and policy issues”, “institutional and administrative constraints”, and “procedural and contextual challenges”. Research limitations/implications The findings provide empirical evidence for understanding the dynamics of SCBs and establish a foundation for prioritizing SCB factors in infrastructure projects. Practical implications This study proposes practical strategies to reduce site clearance delays and improve the implementation efficiency of ODA-funded infrastructure projects. Originality/value This study makes a novel contribution by revealing project stakeholders' perceptions of key factors and introducing a validated clustering-based approach for assessing SCBs in ODA-funded public infrastructure projects aimed at salinity intrusion mitigation.
title_cn: ODA资助的盐碱入侵缓解基础设施项目中导致场地清理瓶颈的因素的层次聚类分析
abstract_cn: 目的 许多基础设施项目已启动，以应对气候变化带来的挑战。在越南，这些项目主要通过官方发展援助（ODA）资金进行融资。然而，在实施过程中，场地清理瓶颈（SCBs）作为主要障碍出现，削弱了项目效率并侵蚀了国家信誉。 设计/方法论/方法 本研究通过文献回顾和专家咨询识别了22个潜在的SCB因素，并使用结构化问卷对140名利益相关者进行了调查。主要分析工具包括Cronbach's alpha、Kruskal-Wallis检验、层次聚类和基于均值的评估建模。 研究结果 分析结果显示，财务问题、补偿价格、支持政策和文件审批是最关键的因素。许多SCB因素之间存在强烈共识，“财务限制”和“市场条件不稳定”在所有利益相关者群体中均被一致排名。层次聚类将22个因素分为四个可靠的组，按重要性降序排列为：“财务和安置压力”、“补偿和政策问题”、“制度和行政限制”以及“程序和背景挑战”。 研究局限性/影响 研究结果为理解SCBs的动态提供了实证依据，并为在基础设施项目中优先考虑SCB因素奠定了基础。 实践意义 本研究提出了减少场地清理延误和提高ODA资助基础设施项目实施效率的实用策略。 原创性/价值 本研究通过揭示项目利益相关者对关键因素的看法，并引入一种经过验证的基于聚类的方法来评估旨在缓解盐碱入侵的ODA资助公共基础设施项目中的SCBs，做出了新颖的贡献。

title: Linking cognitive distraction to construction workers’ unsafe behaviors: the role of hazard perception and cognitive load
abstract: Purpose Cognitive distraction has been widely recognized as a contributor to unsafe behavior, yet its underlying mechanisms among construction workers remain insufficiently understood. To fill this gap, this study examined the effect of cognitive distraction on construction workers’ unsafe behaviors by exploring the mediating role of hazard perception and the moderating role of cognitive load. Design/methodology/approach We collected 324 valid questionnaires from frontline construction workers using a multi-wave survey research design. Structural equation modeling and hierarchical regression analysis were utilized to analyze the data. Findings The findings revealed that: (1) cognitive distraction was positively associated with unsafe behavior, (2) hazard perception mediated the relationship between cognitive distraction and unsafe behavior, (3) cognitive load amplified the detrimental effect of cognitive distraction on unsafe behavior (β = 0.211, p &lt; 0.001). It also significantly strengthened the protective effect of hazard perception against unsafe behavior (β = −2.384, p &lt; 0.001), suggesting a risk compensation effect, and (4) Multi-group analysis further revealed that cognitive distraction more strongly increased unsafe behaviors among older and more experienced workers, whereas hazard perception played a stronger protective role in these groups. Originality/value The primary theoretical contribution of this work lies in elucidating the mechanism and boundary conditions of how cognitive distraction influences unsafe behavior by incorporating hazard perception and cognitive load as critical factors. Practically, the results offer clear implications for safety management. Under high cognitive load, minimizing distractions or enhancing workers’ hazard perception can significantly reduce the risk of unsafe behavior.
title_cn: 将认知干扰与建筑工人的不安全行为联系起来：危险感知和认知负荷的作用
abstract_cn: 目的 认知干扰被广泛认为是导致不安全行为的因素，但其在建筑工人中的潜在机制仍然不够清楚。为填补这一空白，本研究通过探讨危险感知的中介作用和认知负荷的调节作用，考察了认知干扰对建筑工人不安全行为的影响。 设计/方法论/途径 我们采用多波次调查研究设计，从一线建筑工人中收集了324份有效问卷。利用结构方程模型和分层回归分析对数据进行了分析。 发现 研究结果显示：(1) 认知干扰与不安全行为呈正相关；(2) 危险感知在认知干扰与不安全行为之间起到了中介作用；(3) 认知负荷加剧了认知干扰对不安全行为的负面影响（β = 0.211, p < 0.001）。它还显著增强了危险感知对不安全行为的保护作用（β = −2.384, p < 0.001），这表明存在风险补偿效应；(4) 多组分析进一步显示，认知干扰对年长和经验丰富的工人的不安全行为影响更大，而在这些群体中，危险感知发挥了更强的保护作用。 原创性/价值 本研究的主要理论贡献在于阐明了认知干扰如何影响不安全行为的机制及其边界条件，结合了危险感知和认知负荷作为关键因素。从实践角度来看，研究结果为安全管理提供了明确的启示。在高认知负荷下，减少干扰或增强工人的危险感知可以显著降低不安全行为的风险。

title: Developing an integrated framework for post-occupancy housing quality evaluation in mass housing: a user-centered IPA–gap–Kano approach
abstract: Purpose Despite the global rise in mass housing developments, their quality often remains inadequate. This is largely attributed to the neglect of the multidimensional nature of housing quality and the lack of alignment with user expectations. This study develops a comprehensive framework for evaluating mass housing quality at the post-occupancy stage, centered on resident perspectives. Design/methodology/approach A hybrid methodology combining importance–performance analysis (IPA), gap analysis and the Kano model is employed within a post-occupancy evaluation (POE) framework. Data were collected from 143 residents of a mass housing project in Pardis City, Iran, via structured questionnaires assessing 121 indicators across eight dimensions: functionality, form and aesthetics, comfort and performance, sustainability, site, location, service product, and construction and services. Findings The results revealed 64 underperforming indicators, including 20 critical dissatisfaction drivers such as poor security, unsafe streets, noise pollution and inflexible layouts. Four core dimensions – functionality, comfort and performance, site, and location – were key to reducing dissatisfaction, while others mainly enhanced satisfaction. A four-level improvement strategy was proposed to guide interventions within budget limits. Originality/value This study introduces a novel “Service Product” dimension to capture tangible post-occupancy deliverables, bridging service and product quality. Unlike earlier studies, it demonstrates that poor performance does not always equate to dissatisfaction, highlighting the need to distinguish between satisfaction and dissatisfaction drivers. The framework systematically centers on user expectations, offering a psychologically grounded approach to understanding residential (dis)satisfaction.
title_cn: 在大规模住房中开发一个集成框架用于后占用住房质量评估：以用户为中心的IPA–差距–Kano方法
abstract_cn: 目的 尽管全球范围内大规模住房开发不断增加，但其质量往往仍然不尽如人意。这在很大程度上归因于对住房质量多维特性的忽视以及与用户期望之间缺乏一致性。本研究建立了一个全面的框架，用于评估后占用阶段的大规模住房质量，重点关注居民的视角。 设计/方法论/方法 本研究在后占用评估（POE）框架内采用了一种结合重要性-表现分析（IPA）、差距分析和Kano模型的混合方法。通过结构化问卷收集了来自伊朗帕尔迪斯市一项大规模住房项目的143名居民的数据，评估了121个指标，涵盖八个维度：功能性、形式与美学、舒适性与性能、可持续性、场地、位置、服务产品以及建筑与服务。 发现 结果显示64个表现不佳的指标，其中包括20个关键的不满驱动因素，如安全性差、不安全的街道、噪音污染和不灵活的布局。四个核心维度——功能性、舒适性与性能、场地和位置——是减少不满的关键，而其他维度主要增强了满意度。提出了一种四级改进策略，以指导在预算限制内的干预。 原创性/价值 本研究引入了一个新颖的“服务产品”维度，以捕捉可触及的后占用交付成果，架起了服务与产品质量之间的桥梁。与早期研究不同，本研究表明，表现不佳并不总是等同于不满，强调了区分满意和不满意驱动因素的必要性。该框架系统地以用户期望为中心，提供了一种心理学基础的方法来理解居民的（不）满意度。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Impact of ICT Function Use on Employees’ Job Performance in International Engineering Enterprises: A Configurational Perspective
abstract: The widespread application of information and communication technology (ICT) enhances the efficiency of information transmission across geographically dispersed organizations and reduces communication costs, providing opportunities for international engineering enterprises to effectively support overseas project departments. However, existing studies have also recognized the negative impacts of ICT use on overseas employees’ performance, such as causing information overload and increasing job stress on employees. Traditional linear analysis methods struggle to reveal the interactions between distinct ICT functions and lack differentiated explanations for ICT management tactics under varying contextual conditions. This study introduces a configurational perspective, analyzing survey data from 179 employees in overseas project departments of international engineering enterprises. By using fuzzy-set qualitative comparative analysis (fsQCA), this study systematically investigates the dynamic alignment patterns among ICT support, ICT control, ICT-induced job stress, project size, and job complexity. The study reveals complementary and substitutive relationships between ICT functions and their impact paths on job performance across different contexts. Key findings include: (1) Three pathways lead to the high job performance of employees in overseas project departments, with path selection influenced by contextual conditions, including project size and job complexity; (2) low job performance is not symmetrically related to high performance but arises from control failure (high-frequency control with high stress) or the absence of ICT support function; and (3) ICT-induced job stress primarily stems from control function, while support function mitigates such stress. The results provide theoretical insights into the interplay of ICT functions, contextual conditions, and their impacts on job performance. Practical guidance is offered for enterprises to optimize ICT use for enhanced employee performance.
title_cn: 信息与通信技术功能使用对国际工程企业员工工作表现的影响：一种配置视角
abstract_cn: 信息与通信技术（ICT）的广泛应用提高了地理分散组织间信息传递的效率，降低了沟通成本，为国际工程企业有效支持海外项目部门提供了机会。然而，现有研究也认识到ICT使用对海外员工绩效的负面影响，例如导致信息过载和增加员工工作压力。传统的线性分析方法难以揭示不同ICT功能之间的相互作用，并且在不同情境条件下缺乏对ICT管理策略的差异化解释。本研究引入了配置视角，分析了来自179名国际工程企业海外项目部门员工的调查数据。通过使用模糊集定性比较分析（fsQCA），本研究系统地探讨了ICT支持、ICT控制、ICT引发的工作压力、项目规模和工作复杂性之间的动态对齐模式。研究揭示了ICT功能之间的互补和替代关系及其在不同情境下对工作绩效的影响路径。主要发现包括：（1）三条路径导致海外项目部门员工的高工作绩效，路径选择受项目规模和工作复杂性等情境条件的影响；（2）低工作绩效与高工作绩效并非对称关系，而是源于控制失败（高频控制伴随高压力）或缺乏ICT支持功能；（3）ICT引发的工作压力主要源于控制功能，而支持功能则缓解了这种压力。研究结果为ICT功能、情境条件及其对工作绩效的影响之间的相互作用提供了理论见解，并为企业优化ICT使用以提升员工绩效提供了实践指导。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Integrated Dual-Crane Positioning and Lifting Planning in Extreme Conditions: A Critical States and Spatial Constraint Optimization Approach
abstract: The intelligent planning of dual-crane cooperative lifting has emerged as a critical enabling technology for handling heavy and oversized payloads in complex engineering environments, particularly as infrastructure projects increase in scale and operational constraints become more challenging. However, existing planning methods neglect the critical influence of crane positioning on path feasibility. Besides, they remain inadequate for extreme conditions where payloads approach maximum capacity, and even minor swings may trigger catastrophic instability. This study proposes a hierarchical optimization framework for dual-crane positioning and lifting planning under such extreme scenarios, integrating critical states and spatial constraints. The upper layer systematically optimizes crane positions and motions by resolving geometric constraints between cranes and payloads, including working radii, boom lengths, slewing angles, and hoisting length. A weighted multiobjective function is formulated to balance energy consumption and time efficiency, and an improved A* algorithm is used to efficiently solve the integrated optimization problem through critical states discretization, where slewing motion is segmented into several phases. Furthermore, the lower layer enforces spatial synchronization through antiswing trajectory planning, where angular velocity profiles of both cranes are coordinated to maintain payload stability while adhering to crane-payload geometric constraints. Through simulation and software platform-based pseudo-experiments, the proposed method demonstrates a 66.57% improvement in computational efficiency and a 50.04% enhancement in safety performance compared to traditional approaches, while ensuring guaranteed collision avoidance and mechanical feasibility in extreme conditions. The proposed method significantly enhances safety and maximizes payload utilization under extreme conditions, providing a robust theoretical and practical framework that addresses fundamental challenges in modern dual-crane lifting operations.
topics: Dynamics and Control of Mechanical Systems
title_cn: 极端条件下的集成双起重机定位与提升规划：一种关键状态与空间约束优化方法
abstract_cn: 双起重机协同提升的智能规划已成为在复杂工程环境中处理重型和超大负载的关键技术，尤其是在基础设施项目规模不断扩大、操作约束日益严峻的背景下。然而，现有的规划方法忽视了起重机定位对路径可行性的关键影响。此外，它们在负载接近最大容量的极端条件下仍显得不足，甚至微小的摆动都可能引发灾难性的失稳。本研究提出了一种针对极端场景下双起重机定位与提升规划的分层优化框架，整合了关键状态和空间约束。上层通过解决起重机与负载之间的几何约束（包括工作半径、臂长、回转角度和提升长度）系统地优化起重机的位置和运动。构建了一个加权多目标函数，以平衡能耗和时间效率，并采用改进的A*算法通过关键状态离散化高效解决集成优化问题，其中回转运动被分为多个阶段。此外，下层通过抗摆轨迹规划强制实施空间同步，协调两台起重机的角速度曲线，以在遵循起重机-负载几何约束的同时保持负载稳定。通过仿真和基于软件平台的伪实验，所提方法在计算效率上比传统方法提高了66.57%，在安全性能上提升了50.04%，同时确保在极端条件下的碰撞避免和机械可行性。所提方法显著增强了安全性，并在极端条件下最大化了负载利用率，提供了一个强有力的理论和实践框架，解决了现代双起重机提升作业中的基本挑战。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Exploring Digital–Real Integration in the Construction Industry: Driving Force of Digital Technology Innovation Network Embedding
abstract: Digital–real integration is an important driving force to propel industry transformation, upgrading, and sustainable development. Existing studies have considered digital–real integration as an independent variable, but few have considered it as a dependent variable. This study, taking the construction industry as the research scenario, investigates the impact of network embedding on digital–real integration from a complex network perspective. Using digital technology patents identified by a novel method as the database, this paper constructs a digital technology innovation network. Based on this, it develops a novel indicator to measure digital–real integration at the micro level as the dependent variable, investigates the direct influence of network embedding on digital–real integration, and assesses the moderating role of node clustering in this process. Furthermore, utilizing enterprises’ cash flows as a basis, this paper categorizes enterprises into growth, maturity, and decline stages, and examines the effect of embedding on digital–real integration across each of these stages. This study revealed that structural and relational embedding positively impacts digital–real integration, whereas knowledge element clustering exhibits a negative moderating effect. Additionally, an inverted U-shaped relationship was observed between the knowledge element ratio and digital–real integration. It is noteworthy that relational embedding becomes a key factor for construction enterprises in improving digital–real integration level, and construction enterprises can optimize the proportion of knowledge elements to find new transformation opportunities in the decline stage. This paper provides theoretical and practical guidance for construction enterprises to effectively configure their own knowledge structure to enhance the digital–real integration level.
title_cn: 探索建筑行业中的数字-现实整合：数字技术创新网络嵌入的驱动力
abstract_cn: 数字与现实的融合是推动产业转型、升级和可持续发展的重要动力。现有研究将数字与现实的融合视为一个自变量，但很少将其视为因变量。本研究以建筑行业为研究场景，从复杂网络的视角探讨网络嵌入对数字与现实融合的影响。采用一种新颖的方法识别的数字技术专利作为数据库，构建了数字技术创新网络。在此基础上，开发了一种新指标，以微观层面衡量数字与现实的融合，作为因变量，研究网络嵌入对数字与现实融合的直接影响，并评估节点聚类在这一过程中的调节作用。此外，利用企业的现金流作为基础，将企业分为成长、成熟和衰退三个阶段，考察嵌入对各阶段数字与现实融合的影响。本研究揭示了结构性和关系性嵌入对数字与现实融合的积极影响，而知识元素聚类则表现出负向调节效应。此外，观察到知识元素比例与数字与现实融合之间存在倒U型关系。值得注意的是，关系性嵌入成为建筑企业提升数字与现实融合水平的关键因素，建筑企业可以优化知识元素的比例，以在衰退阶段寻找新的转型机会。本文为建筑企业有效配置自身知识结构以提升数字与现实融合水平提供了理论和实践指导。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Investigating the Causes and Their Interactions Leading to Supply Chain Risks in Prefabricated Construction: Configuration Perspective
abstract: The additional stakeholders and production environments within the networked supply chains of prefabricated construction (PC) have aggravated multiple causes of supply chain risks (SCRs) and their complex interactions. However, existing research primarily focused on risk identification and assessment, with limited exploration of how SCRs are generated by these causes and their interactions in different configurations. This study develops a hybrid method to investigate the configurational and interactive impacts of these causes on SCRs. First, a literature review was used to identify 35 causes, which were classified into 9 categories. Second, two rounds of questionnaire surveys and an expert interview within China’s construction sector were conducted for data collection. Then, fuzzy set qualitative comparative analysis (fsQCA) was used to identify the configurations of causes leading to SCRs. A fuzzy Bayesian network (FBN) model was subsequently developed to explore the causes’ interactions under different configurations. Finally, scenario analysis was conducted by the FBN model to identify the optimal SCRs management scenarios (MS). Results reveal two types of configurations of SCRs causes: process and network-oriented, and environment-oriented configurations, in which the environment causes, as well as information and partnerships causes, exhibit mutually substitutive effects in triggering SCRs. Also, the key causal paths triggering SCRs differ across those two configurations, with the former being mainly characterized by planning, procurement, and manufacturing-led paths, and the latter being characterized by environment-led paths. Moreover, addressing the same risk cause in different configurations demonstrates heterogeneous effects on SCRs prevention. In addition, tackling risk causes located in multiple positions (root and non-root nodes) in the FBN model proves to be more effective than focusing on those located in a single position in SCRs prevention. By innovatively integrating both configuration and interaction perspectives to explore the causes leading to SCRs and their interrelationships, this study not only enhances the configuration understanding of SCRs formation in PC, but also quantitatively reveals the heterogeneous influence paths through which those causes collectively contribute to SCRs. The integration of fsQCA and FBN (fsQCA-FBN) framework developed in this study establishes a novel analytical paradigm that can be applied to other project-based industries for SCRs mitigation. Valuable implications for improving risk management effectiveness can also be drawn from the key causal paths and MS for industry practitioners to mitigate SCRs.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 调查导致预制建筑供应链风险的原因及其相互作用：配置视角
abstract_cn: 在预制建筑（PC）的网络化供应链中，额外的利益相关者和生产环境加剧了多种供应链风险（SCRs）及其复杂的相互作用。然而，现有研究主要集中在风险识别和评估上，较少探讨这些原因及其在不同配置中相互作用如何生成SCRs。本研究开发了一种混合方法，以调查这些原因对SCRs的配置和交互影响。首先，通过文献综述识别出35个原因，并将其分类为9个类别。其次，在中国建筑行业进行了两轮问卷调查和专家访谈以收集数据。然后，采用模糊集定性比较分析（fsQCA）识别导致SCRs的原因配置。随后，开发了模糊贝叶斯网络（FBN）模型，以探索不同配置下原因之间的相互作用。最后，通过FBN模型进行情景分析，以识别最佳的SCRs管理情景（MS）。结果揭示了两种类型的SCRs原因配置：以过程和网络为导向的配置，以及以环境为导向的配置，其中环境原因以及信息和合作伙伴原因在触发SCRs方面表现出相互替代的效应。此外，触发SCRs的关键因果路径在这两种配置中有所不同，前者主要以规划、采购和制造为主导路径，后者则以环境为主导路径。此外，在不同配置中处理相同的风险原因对SCRs的预防表现出异质性效果。此外，解决位于FBN模型中多个位置（根节点和非根节点）的风险原因被证明比仅关注位于单一位置的风险原因在SCRs预防中更为有效。本研究通过创新性地整合配置和交互视角，探讨导致SCRs的原因及其相互关系，不仅增强了对PC中SCRs形成的配置理解，还定量揭示了这些原因共同导致SCRs的异质性影响路径。本研究开发的fsQCA与FBN（fsQCA-FBN）框架建立了一种新颖的分析范式，可应用于其他基于项目的行业以减轻SCRs。行业从业者也可以从关键因果路径和管理情景中获得有价值的启示，以提高风险管理的有效性。

title: ChatGPT as a Training Coach: Pattern-Specific Outcomes in Build America Buy America Act Training
abstract: This study explores the role of generative artificial intelligence (Gen-AI) as a compliance training agent by examining how interactive prompt patterns influence knowledge acquisition in the context of the Build America Buy America (BABA) Act. Amid growing interest in scalable, personalized learning tools, this experiment tests ChatGPT’s capacity to deliver regulatory education through adaptive coaching styles. The methodology integrates pre- and post-training assessments, control questions for knowledge retention, and coaching formats that range from scenario-based to interactive and gamified prompts. Results reveal that Gen-AI-driven training significantly improves compliance knowledge, particularly when prompt structures are aligned with learners’ prior understanding. Participants with low initial knowledge exhibited the greatest gains, indicating the value of real-time feedback and conversational scaffolding in supporting novice learners. Furthermore, control items confirm that learning was substantive rather than superficial, reinforcing Gen-AI’s potential for anchored instruction. However, the effectiveness of prompt types varied by knowledge tier, with structured formats outperforming more exploratory ones specifically among less-prepared participants. These findings carry meaningful implications for public-sector training: while Gen-AI training agents can extend access and personalize instruction, their design must consider learner readiness and cognitive load. The study also identifies prompt development as a core challenge, requiring balance between engagement, clarity, and instructional depth. As such, this research contributes both empirical evidence and practical guidance for integrating Gen-AI into compliance training, emphasizing the importance of pairing technological capability with pedagogical intent to ensure measurable learning outcomes.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: ChatGPT作为培训教练：在《建设美国，购买美国法》培训中的模式特定结果
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了生成性人工智能（Gen-AI）作为合规培训代理的角色，通过考察互动提示模式如何影响《建设美国，购买美国法案》（BABA法案）背景下的知识获取。在对可扩展、个性化学习工具日益增长的兴趣中，本实验测试了ChatGPT通过适应性辅导风格提供监管教育的能力。研究方法结合了培训前后的评估、知识保留的控制问题，以及从情景基础到互动和游戏化提示的多种辅导形式。结果显示，基于Gen-AI的培训显著提高了合规知识，尤其是在提示结构与学习者的先前理解相一致时。初始知识较低的参与者表现出最大的进步，表明实时反馈和对话支架在支持初学者方面的价值。此外，控制项目确认学习是实质性的而非表面的，进一步强化了Gen-AI作为基础教学的潜力。然而，提示类型的有效性因知识层级而异，结构化格式在准备不足的参与者中表现优于更具探索性的格式。这些发现对公共部门培训具有重要意义：尽管Gen-AI培训代理可以扩展访问和个性化教学，但其设计必须考虑学习者的准备程度和认知负担。研究还将提示开发确定为一项核心挑战，需要在参与度、清晰度和教学深度之间取得平衡。因此，本研究为将Gen-AI整合到合规培训中提供了实证证据和实践指导，强调了将技术能力与教学意图相结合以确保可测量学习成果的重要性。

title: Contract Management of BIM-Based Projects in the Brazilian Public Sector: Contractors’ and Owners’ Perspectives
abstract: Building information modeling (BIM) is currently a prevalent approach for a new way of managing the design, construction, operation, and maintenance of a project. In this context this study investigates how contract management can be better aligned with BIM-based public construction projects in Brazil, emphasizing the potential of agile-inspired mechanisms to address the limitations of traditional contractual frameworks. A qualitative approach was adopted, using semistructured interviews with public-sector professionals and private contractors to examine BIM applications, organizational practices, and the integration of BIM into contract management. The findings reveal persistent gaps, including vague contractual clauses, fragmented responsibilities, limited use of common data environments (CDEs), and insufficient institutional capacity. Based on these insights, the study proposes the following practical recommendations for public-sector contract managers: embedding explicit BIM clauses, mandating CDE use, clarifying roles and approval workflows, adopting modular contracting where feasible, investing in training, and pursuing regulatory adjustments. A three-layer conceptual framework is developed, linking BIM functionalities, contract management activities, and agile-oriented recommendations, highlighting how digital processes reshape contractual requirements and how adaptive strategies can enhance efficiency, transparency, and collaboration. The research offers both theoretical and practical contributions. Theoretically, by connecting BIM and agile concepts to contract management, and practically, by providing guidance for more integrated and adaptive public procurement practices.
title_cn: 巴西公共部门基于BIM项目的合同管理：承包商与业主的视角
abstract_cn: 建筑信息建模（BIM）目前是一种流行的方法，用于管理项目的设计、施工、运营和维护。在此背景下，本研究探讨了如何更好地将合同管理与巴西基于BIM的公共建设项目对接，强调灵感来自敏捷机制的潜力，以解决传统合同框架的局限性。研究采用定性方法，通过对公共部门专业人士和私营承包商进行半结构化访谈，考察BIM应用、组织实践以及BIM在合同管理中的整合。研究结果揭示了持续存在的差距，包括模糊的合同条款、职责分散、共同数据环境（CDEs）使用有限以及机构能力不足。基于这些见解，研究提出以下针对公共部门合同管理者的实用建议：嵌入明确的BIM条款、强制使用CDE、明确角色和审批工作流程、在可行的情况下采用模块化合同、投资培训以及寻求监管调整。研究还开发了一个三层概念框架，将BIM功能、合同管理活动和以敏捷为导向的建议联系起来，突显数字化流程如何重塑合同要求，以及适应性策略如何提升效率、透明度和协作。该研究提供了理论和实践上的贡献。从理论上讲，通过将BIM和敏捷概念与合同管理相连接；从实践上讲，为更为综合和适应性的公共采购实践提供指导。

title: Unraveling Stakeholder Engagement in Megaprojects: A Political Opportunity Structure Perspective in Turbulent Times
abstract: Infrastructure projects are often tied to political agendas, leading to community skepticism and opposition. This study explores how changes in the political system influenced engagement between project opposers and project promoters. Using a qualitative research approach and a case study strategy, archival data related to the prematurely terminated Bisri Dam megaproject in Lebanon were collected and analyzed. Results show that deepened division among political parties (configuration of power) and a wider distribution of power among project opposers (formal institutional structure) intensified opposition, leading to project cancellation. This study highlights the importance of considering a broad political perspective in project stakeholder engagement to improve megaproject outcomes from a socially sustainable standpoint.
title_cn: 揭示大项目中的利益相关者参与：动荡时期的政治机会结构视角
abstract_cn: 基础设施项目往往与政治议程密切相关，这导致了社区的怀疑和反对。本研究探讨了政治体制的变化如何影响项目反对者与项目推动者之间的互动。采用定性研究方法和案例研究策略，收集并分析了与黎巴嫩提前终止的比斯里大坝大型项目相关的档案数据。结果表明，政治党派之间的深度分裂（权力配置）和项目反对者之间更广泛的权力分配（正式制度结构）加剧了反对情绪，最终导致项目取消。本研究强调，在项目利益相关者参与中考虑广泛的政治视角的重要性，以从社会可持续的角度改善大型项目的成果。

title: Investigating the critical building layout features on the wayfinding process by integrating graph theory and virtual reality
title_cn: 通过整合图论和虚拟现实，研究关键建筑布局特征对路径寻找过程的影响

title: Occupational injuries and workplace assaults among migrant workers in Victoria, Australia: a study of emergency department presentations
abstract: • Occupational injury risk was higher in Sudanese and Afghan-born than local workers. • In contrast, migrant workers born in China and India had much lower injury rates. • Injury prevention must recognise that migrant workers are not a single group. • Policies should prioritise high-risk groups with culturally tailored safety programs. Migrant workers are often employed in risky jobs and may experience barriers to safe work environments. In the event of a workplace injury, including assaults, healthcare is often sought from Emergency Departments (EDs). We examined differences in ED presentation rates for occupational injuries by country of birth, among workers in Victoria. Data were derived from the Victorian Emergency Minimum Dataset (01/07/2019–30/06/2023), provided to the Victorian Injury Surveillance Unit by Victoria’s Department of Health. Occupational physical injuries for persons aged 15–69 years were identified and injury rates were calculated accounting for population Labour Force distribution by country of birth, sex, age and year. There were 111,604 ED presentations with occupational injuries, an annual rate of 9.0/1000 employed persons. The highest injury rates were among Sudan-born (26/1000), Afghanistan-born (23/1000), and Samoa-born (21/1000) workers. Rates among Australia-born and New Zealand-born workers were similar (11/1000), while workers born in India and China had lower rates (4.3/1000 and 3.8/1000, respectively). Variability in injury rates by country of birth persisted after controlling for age and sex. Occupational injury rates due to assault were highest among younger workers and those born in Afghanistan, India, Iran, Iraq, Pakistan and Turkey compared to those born in Australia. Results from this study show that rates of ED presentations for occupational injuries and workplace assault injuries varied substantially by country of birth. To maximise occupational health and safety, this finding warrants further investigation, using qualitative methods and detailed occupational and ethnographic datasets, to better understand reasons for these disparities.
title_cn: 维多利亚州澳大利亚移民工人的职业伤害和工作场所袭击：急诊科就诊情况研究
abstract_cn:
• 苏丹和阿富汗出生的工人的职业伤害风险高于当地工人。 
• 相比之下，出生于中国和印度的移民工人伤害率则低得多。 
• 伤害预防必须认识到移民工人并非单一群体。 
• 政策应优先考虑高风险群体，并提供文化适应性的安全项目。 移民工人通常从事高风险工作，可能面临安全工作环境的障碍。在发生工作场所伤害（包括攻击）时，通常会寻求急诊科的医疗服务。我们研究了维多利亚州不同出生国工人的职业伤害急诊就诊率差异。数据来源于维多利亚州急诊最低数据集（2019年7月1日至2023年6月30日），由维多利亚州卫生部提供给维多利亚伤害监测单位。识别了15至69岁人群的职业性身体伤害，并根据出生国、性别、年龄和年份计算了伤害率。共记录了111,604例职业伤害的急诊就诊，年就诊率为每千名就业人员9.0例。伤害率最高的工人是苏丹出生（每千人26例）、阿富汗出生（每千人23例）和萨摩亚出生（每千人21例）。澳大利亚出生和新西兰出生的工人伤害率相似（每千人11例），而出生于印度和中国的工人伤害率较低（分别为每千人4.3例和3.8例）。在控制年龄和性别后，出生国的伤害率差异依然存在。由于攻击导致的职业伤害率在年轻工人及出生于阿富汗、印度、伊朗、伊拉克、巴基斯坦和土耳其的工人中最高，相比之下，出生于澳大利亚的工人伤害率较低。本研究的结果表明，职业伤害和工作场所攻击伤害的急诊就诊率在不同出生国之间存在显著差异。为了最大化职业健康与安全，这一发现需要进一步研究，采用定性方法和详细的职业及民族志数据集，以更好地理解这些差异的原因。

title: MRDenseNet: automated building damage detection model after the earthquake with a combination-based deep feature engineering
title_cn: MRDenseNet：一种基于组合深度特征工程的自动化地震后建筑损伤检测模型

title: Emergency management and social vulnerability in climate adaptation: the case of public safety power shutoffs
title_cn: 气候适应中的应急管理与社会脆弱性：公共安全停电的案例

title: Pedestrian level wind assessment of historic urban forms: A study of Massawa, Eritrea
abstract: Pedestrian-level wind comfort and safety are essential considerations in promoting urban comfort for shaping the quality of the urban environment. Assessment of pedestrian wind environments is, however, typically associated with modern urban development areas, with limited application in historic contexts despite their embedded wisdom in climate responsive building design and city planning. Moreover, there is a limitation in accounting for the effects of comprehensive planning and the combined influence of different morphological factors, with emphasis commonly limited to building scales in most studies. This research examines the impact of urban form and building design on the pedestrian wind environment in the historic port city of Massawa, Eritrea. Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) simulations were conducted on six models representing the evolution of urban forms over nearly 150 years to understand their effect on the pedestrian wind environment. Simulations were conducted for each model in two prevailing wind directions, with a particular focus on velocity amplification analysis to understand the design-related contributions comparatively. Results mainly show that organic urban forms created less wind activity in the core of the city, with high wind acceleration mostly related to buildings in the windward direction. In contrast, gridded urban forms with broad and straight street corridors create a channeling effect, creating more areas of potential wind discomfort in the core of the city. Thus, highlighting the need for future microclimate studies to understand microclimate differences in different urban forms informed by varying underlying factors. • Pedestrian-level wind environment study was conducted in a historic heritage site. • Six models representing urban form change over nearly 150 years were studied. • Organic urban forms created less wind activity in the core of the city. • Gridded urban forms with broad and straight street corridors increase wind activity. • Destruction of heritage causes loss of heritage and alters the wind flow patterns.
title_cn: 历史城市形态的行人级风环境评估：厄立特里亚马萨瓦的研究
abstract_cn: 行人级别的风舒适性和安全性是促进城市舒适性、塑造城市环境质量的重要考虑因素。然而，行人风环境的评估通常与现代城市发展区域相关，在历史背景下的应用有限，尽管这些历史背景中蕴含了应对气候的建筑设计和城市规划的智慧。此外，在综合规划的影响和不同形态因素的综合作用方面也存在局限性，大多数研究通常仅限于建筑尺度。本文研究了厄立特里亚历史港口城市马萨瓦的城市形态和建筑设计对行人风环境的影响。通过计算流体动力学（CFD）模拟了六个模型，代表近150年来城市形态的演变，以理解它们对行人风环境的影响。对每个模型在两个主导风向下进行了模拟，特别关注风速放大分析，以比较设计相关的贡献。结果主要显示，城市核心区域的有机城市形态产生的风活动较少，而高风加速主要与迎风方向的建筑有关。相比之下，具有宽阔且笔直街道走廊的网格城市形态则产生了引导效应，导致城市核心区域潜在的风不适感增加。因此，强调了未来微气候研究的必要性，以了解不同城市形态中受不同潜在因素影响的微气候差异。 • 在历史遗产地进行了行人级别风环境研究。 • 研究了六个代表近150年城市形态变化的模型。 • 有机城市形态在城市核心区域产生的风活动较少。 • 具有宽阔且笔直街道走廊的网格城市形态增加了风活动。 • 遗产的破坏导致遗产损失并改变风流模式。
